description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Make the Code-tab file tree a slide-out drawer instead of a panel above the diffs:
- Drawer slides out from the LEFT of the Code-tab content area (not the page edge — must stay inside the second/main column).
- Open by default; clicking a file link in the drawer or scrolling the page closes it.
- When closed, a small tab on the left edge re-opens it on click.
- Folders within the tree become individually collapsible (each is its own <details>).
- Same treatment for the misc panel.
title: Polish v4: file tree as slide-out drawer + collapsible folders
